title: Sphaeropteris discophora
taxonomy: Sphaeropteris discophora is classified in the family Cyatheaceae, which belongs to the order Cyatheales. This plant is part of the division Pteridophyta and the phylum Pteridophyta. It further falls under the kingdom Plantae. The classification reflects its status as a type of tree fern native to the tropical regions. Sphaeropteris discophora's specific classification is used to differentiate it from other species of tree ferns.
